summary:
EXECUTIVE READ
India activity concentrates in Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh, Telangana, Tamil Nadu, and Andhra Pradesh, driven by Colo dominance and policy tailwinds in state-DC-policy and govt-scheme-incentive. The top India policy hook is the UP Data Centre Policy 2026 targeting Rs 2 lakh crore investment. Value-chain movers are Colo (285 signals) and Power (14 signals). Foreign hyperscalers active on India include Oracle, Microsoft, Google, AWS, Meta, and Amazon, with Oracle showing the top momentum (+13.5 score).

STATE PLAYS  🤖AI-draft:
The current prospect slate should be steered toward Maharashtra (P1: mature Mumbai/Navi Mumbai ecosystem, strong legal/economic policy), Uttar Pradesh (P1: aggressive NCR/inland cluster incentives, cabinet-approved 2026 policy targeting Rs 2 lakh crore investment), and Telangana (P1: operator-friendly Hyderabad AI/cloud regime with essential-service treatment). Upside states include Odisha (P2: generous white-space policy for first movers, high policy confidence but thin execution).
